```qmd
---
title: "Asif Kachroo Portfolio Website"
subtitle: "Proposal Presentation"
author: "Asif Kachroo"
institute: "IBM 3202, Cal Poly Pomona"
date: '03-14-2026'
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: serif
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    footer: Asif Kachroo Portfolio Website
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: default
    incremental: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    slide-number: true
    scrollable: true
    smaller: true
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: false
    number-depth: 5
    embed-resources: true
    css: styles.css
editor: visual
execute: 
  echo: true
  freeze: auto
---

# My Website Plan

## Purpose

- Create a professional portfolio website
- Showcase academic and creative work
- Present projects in a polished way
- Build an online presence for future opportunities

::: notes
This opening slide introduces the overall purpose of the website project.
:::

# Why I Want This Website

- A portfolio can organize my work in one place
- It can highlight both technical and creative skills
- It can be shared with professors, recruiters, and internship employers
- It gives me more control over how I present myself

# Main Pages of the Website

## Planned Pages

- Home Page
- About Me
- Projects
- Dashboard
- Revealjs Presentation
- Google Analytics / Data Work
- Contact Page

# Home Page

## What it will include

- Short personal introduction
- Professional headshot or visual banner
- Brief statement about my interests and goals
- Navigation to the rest of the site

# Projects Page

## Content ideas

- Class projects
- Data projects
- Marketing or merchandising work
- Case studies
- Visual examples of completed assignments

# Dashboard Page

## Purpose

- Show interactive or static data displays
- Highlight analytics skills
- Present charts, summaries, or insights
- Make the portfolio feel more modern and data-driven

# Revealjs Presentation Page

## Why include this

- Demonstrates presentation skills
- Shows ability to publish work on the web
- Adds a professional and interactive element
- Can support class and group presentation requirements

# Google Analytics / Data Work

## What this section can show

- GA4 assignments
- Data wrangling examples
- Reflection work
- Reports with code and interpretation

# Website Design Goals

## My design priorities

- Clean layout
- Easy navigation
- Professional look
- Clear storytelling
- Mobile-friendly structure

# Strengths of This Project

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
## Professional Strengths

- Organized presentation of work
- Better online visibility
- Stronger personal brand
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
## Skill-Building Strengths

- Improves Quarto skills
- Improves web publishing skills
- Improves presentation design
:::
:::

# Challenges

- Learning Revealjs formatting
- Publishing everything correctly
- Balancing design with content
- Making each page feel connected

# What I Learned

## Main takeaways

- Quarto can be used for both reports and slides
- Revealjs is powerful for web presentations
- Publishing work online makes projects feel more professional
- Building a website requires both structure and storytelling

# Next Steps

1. Finalize website structure
2. Build or refine individual pages
3. Publish presentation online
4. Continue adding class projects and portfolio content

# Published Link

## URL

[Paste your published presentation link here](https://your-presentation-link-here.com)

# Thank You

## Questions?
